message:
feat(core,mvcc,parser,vfs,harness): connection improvements, MVCC type context, replay triage, conformance tests

Connection layer (fsqlite-core):
- Major connection.rs improvements (287-line diff) for robustness and correctness
- Conformance oracle ext and s55 test updates (101+89 lines)
- Cargo.toml dependency updates

MVCC subsystem (fsqlite-mvcc):
- core_types.rs: type improvements and expanded functionality (168-line diff)
- lifecycle.rs: cleanup of unused code paths
- physical_merge.rs: merge logic improvements

Parser & semantic analysis (fsqlite-parser):
- Lexer improvements (70-line diff)
- Semantic analysis updates (21 lines) with corresponding test updates

Type system (fsqlite-types):
- cx.rs: type context expansion (126 lines) for richer type representation
- value.rs: value type improvements (51-line diff)
- New dependency in Cargo.toml

VFS layer (fsqlite-vfs):
- Unix VFS improvements, lib updates, dependency changes

Harness & testing (fsqlite-harness):
- replay_triage.rs: triage enhancements (123 lines)
- fixture_root_contract.rs: fixture contract changes (55 lines)
- New replay triage test (bd_1dp9_7_4)
- Updates to swizzle operations, cooling state machine, property tests
- Oracle preflight doctor and corpus manifest test updates
- Corpus ingest test additions
- log_schema_validator update

Other:
- JSON extension enhancements (fsqlite-ext-json, 84 lines)
- WAL checksum improvements (fsqlite-wal, 23 lines)
- Parameter compat improvements (fsqlite/compat/params.rs, 34 lines)
- B-tree interior_delete_test fix
- Corpus manifest entries added
- Beads issue tracker metadata sync
- New corpus manifest verification script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,9 @@ root_seed = 3520
 [fixture_roots]
 schema_version = "1.0.0"
 fixtures_dir = "crates/fsqlite-harness/conformance"
+fixtures_dir_aliases = ["./crates/fsqlite-harness/conformance"]
 slt_dir = "conformance/slt"
+slt_dir_aliases = ["./conformance/slt"]
 min_fixture_json_files = 8
 min_fixture_entries = 8
 min_fixture_sql_statements = 40

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ rust-version.workspace = true
 [features]
 default = ["native"]
 native = ["dep:asupersync"]
+wasm = []
 
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = { workspace = true }

@@ -85,6 +85,13 @@ if fixture_roots.get("schema_version") != "1.0.0":
 for key in ("fixtures_dir", "slt_dir"):
     if not str(fixture_roots.get(key, "")).strip():
         raise SystemExit(f"fixture_roots.{key} must be non-empty")
+for key in ("fixtures_dir_aliases", "slt_dir_aliases"):
+    aliases = fixture_roots.get(key, [])
+    if not aliases:
+        raise SystemExit(f"fixture_roots.{key} must be non-empty")
+    for alias in aliases:
+        if not str(alias).strip():
+            raise SystemExit(f"fixture_roots.{key} contains empty value")
 for key in (
     "min_fixture_json_files",
     "min_fixture_entries",
